---
title: "Carpinus"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator instead. -->

**Family:** [Betulaceae](/trees/family/betulaceae.html)

## Species summary

| Species | Trees | Planted locations |
|---|---:|---|
| [Hornbeam](/trees/species/hornbeam.html) | 3 | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |
